User.title: User
User.description: Represents a registered user in the chat application.

uid.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

status.description: The presence status of the user.

lastSeen.description: Timestamp indicating when the user was last active.

typingIn.description: The ID of the chat the user is actively typing in, or null.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: Represents a private (1-on-1) or group chat session.

name.description: The name of the chat (used for group chats).

isGroup.description: Whether the chat is a group chat or 1-on-1.

members.description: Array of user UIDs who are members of this chat.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the chat was created.

createdBy.description: UID of the user who created the chat.

lastMessage.description: The latest message details for previewing in the list.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents a message sent within a chat.

text.description: The text content of the message.

senderName.description: Display name of the message sender.

senderPhoto.description: Profile picture URL of the message sender.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the message was sent.

fileName.description: Optional name of the uploaded file.

fileType.description: Optional MIME type of the uploaded file.

users/{userId}.description: Profile document for each user, keyed by user UID.

chats/{chatId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Sub-collection containing all messages sent in a specific chat.
